title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues that teaching AI by hand at human speed, focusing on mathematical foundations rather than latest tools, creates resilient skills that survive hype cycles. He contends that people must change AI rather than AI changing people, rejecting the "AI-native" trap in education.
